message:
perf: Split @core tests into 3 parallel CI jobs for faster execution

- Split 288 platform-independent tests into @core1, @core2, @core3 (96 each)
- Run core test groups in parallel (reduces CI time from 1hr+ to ~30min)
- Update test group files in tests/groups/
- Update documentation and code comments to reflect new structure

files.patch:
@@ -18,10 +18,12 @@ jobs:
   # =============================================================================
   # CPython Compatibility Tests (Platform-specific)
   # =============================================================================
-  test-cpython-core:
-    name: CPython @core (288 tests)
+
+  # Core tests split into 3 parallel jobs for faster CI
+  test-cpython-core1:
+    name: CPython @core1 (96 tests)
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 60
+    timeout-minutes: 30
 
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
@@ -36,43 +38,107 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build
         run: zig build
 
-      - name: Run platform-independent CPython tests
-        id: test-core
+      - name: Run CPython tests (core1)
         run: |
-          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
-          echo "=== DEBUG: Last 20 lines of output ===" >&2
-          tail -20 test_output.txt >&2
-          # Strip ANSI color codes for parsing
+          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core1 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
           sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' test_output.txt > test_output_clean.txt
-          echo "=== DEBUG: Looking for Results/passed ===" >&2
-          grep -E "Results:|passed" test_output_clean.txt | tail -5 >&2 || echo "NO MATCH" >&2
-          # Parse results from "Results: X/Y passed (Z%)" or "All N tests passed!"
           if grep -q "All.*tests passed" test_output_clean.txt; then
             PASSED=$(grep -oE 'All [0-9]+ tests passed' test_output_clean.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)
-            PASSED=${PASSED:-0}
-            FAILED=0
-            TOTAL=$PASSED
+            FAILED=0; TOTAL=$PASSED
           else
             PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' test_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f1)
             TOTAL=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' test_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f1)
-            PASSED=${PASSED:-0}
-            TOTAL=${TOTAL:-0}
-            FAILED=$((TOTAL - PASSED))
+            FAILED=$((${TOTAL:-0} - ${PASSED:-0}))
           fi
-          echo "=== DEBUG: PASSED=$PASSED TOTAL=$TOTAL FAILED=$FAILED ===" >&2
-          RATE=$([ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ] && echo "scale=1; $PASSED * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc || echo "0")
-          # Always write summary
-          echo "## 📊 Test Results - @core" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          RATE=$([ "${TOTAL:-0}" -gt 0 ] && echo "scale=1; ${PASSED:-0} * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc || echo "0")
+          echo "## 📊 Test Results - @core1" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| ✅ Passed | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| ❌ Failed | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "| 📋 Total | $TOTAL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| ✅ Passed | ${PASSED:-0} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| ❌ Failed | ${FAILED:-0} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          # Exit with failure if any tests failed
-          [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ] && exit 1 || true
-        timeout-minutes: 60
+          [ "${FAILED:-0}" -gt 0 ] && exit 1 || true
+        timeout-minutes: 30
+
+  test-cpython-core2:
+    name: CPython @core2 (96 tests)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: zig build
+
+      - name: Run CPython tests (core2)
+        run: |
+          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core2 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
+          sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' test_output.txt > test_output_clean.txt
+          if grep -q "All.*tests passed" test_output_clean.txt; then
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE 'All [0-9]+ tests passed' test_output_clean.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)
+            FAILED=0; TOTAL=$PASSED
+          else
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' test_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f1)
+            TOTAL=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' test_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f1)
+            FAILED=$((${TOTAL:-0} - ${PASSED:-0}))
+          fi
+          RATE=$([ "${TOTAL:-0}" -gt 0 ] && echo "scale=1; ${PASSED:-0} * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc || echo "0")
+          echo "## 📊 Test Results - @core2" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| ✅ Passed | ${PASSED:-0} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| ❌ Failed | ${FAILED:-0} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          [ "${FAILED:-0}" -gt 0 ] && exit 1 || true
+        timeout-minutes: 30
+
+  test-cpython-core3:
+    name: CPython @core3 (96 tests)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
+
+      - name: Build
+        run: zig build
+
+      - name: Run CPython tests (core3)
+        run: |
+          ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test tests/cpython @core3 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt || true
+          sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' test_output.txt > test_output_clean.txt
+          if grep -q "All.*tests passed" test_output_clean.txt; then
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE 'All [0-9]+ tests passed' test_output_clean.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)
+            FAILED=0; TOTAL=$PASSED
+          else
+            PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' test_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f1)
+            TOTAL=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' test_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f1)
+            FAILED=$((${TOTAL:-0} - ${PASSED:-0}))
+          fi
+          RATE=$([ "${TOTAL:-0}" -gt 0 ] && echo "scale=1; ${PASSED:-0} * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc || echo "0")
+          echo "## 📊 Test Results - @core3" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| ✅ Passed | ${PASSED:-0} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| ❌ Failed | ${FAILED:-0} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| 📈 Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          [ "${FAILED:-0}" -gt 0 ] && exit 1 || true
+        timeout-minutes: 30
 
   test-cpython-linux:
     name: CPython @linux (18 tests)
